headline: Sodexo Continues Partnership With Naples Comprehensive Health Extending Contract After More Than 20 Years of Service
summary: NORTH BETHESDA, Md., June 29, 2026--Sodexo, a leading provider in high-quality food and facilities management solutions, announced today the continuation of its foodservice and facilities management contract with Naples Comprehensive Health (NCH).
